name: Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort
address: 200 MOO 3 T. NONGTALAY, A. MUANG, Klong Muang, Krabi, Thái Lan
description:
Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort - Nơi tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort là một khách sạn 5.0 sao tọa lạc tại thành phố Krabi, Thái Lan. Với vị trí thuận lợi, khách sạn này gần trung tâm thành phố chỉ cách 20 km và cách sân bay 40 phút đi xe. Với 276 phòng, khách sạn được xây dựng vào năm 2006 và mang đến cho khách hàng những trải nghiệm đẳng cấp.

Khách sạn Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort chào đón quý khách từ 02:00 PM để thực hiện thủ tục nhận phòng. Quý khách có thể thoải mái tận hưởng không gian nghỉ ngơi tại một trong 276 phòng sang trọng và tiện nghi. Được trang bị đầy đủ tiện nghi hiện đại, các phòng ở đây đảm bảo sự thoải mái và hài lòng cho du khách. 

Khách sạn này cũng có chính sách đặc biệt dành cho trẻ em. Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort cho phép trẻ em từ 0 đến 11 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí. Đây là một điểm cộng lớn cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ khi lựa chọn nơi nghỉ ngơi. Với môi trường an toàn và dịch vụ chăm sóc chuyên nghiệp, khách sạn này là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời để cả gia đình có thể tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thú vị tại Krabi.

Trung tâm giải trí đẳng cấp tại Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng những giây phút vui chơi thú vị. Khu vực giải trí của resort bao gồm nhiều tiện nghi đa dạng như cửa hàng, quầy bar, salon làm đẹp, dịch vụ massage, bồn tắm nước nóng, phòng xông hơi và phòng xông hơi đá muối Himalaya. 

Ngoài ra, resort còn có spa cao cấp để bạn thư giãn và tái tạo năng lượng. Khu vườn xanh mát là nơi lý tưởng để tận hưởng không gian tự nhiên và thư giãn. Nếu bạn muốn tham gia vào những trò chơi vui nhộn, khu vực phòng chơi và thư viện của resort sẽ là lựa chọn hoàn hảo. Nếu bạn muốn tận hưởng không gian chung và xem truyền hình, khu vực phòng chung và TV cũng rất thuận tiện. Bên cạnh đó, resort còn có cửa hàng quà lưu niệm để bạn mua sắm và lưu giữ những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ từ chuyến du lịch của mình. Với những tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng như vậy, Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort chắc chắn sẽ mang đến cho bạn những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ và thú vị.

Tiện nghi thể thao tại Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort tọa lạc tại Krabi, Thái Lan, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích thể thao. Khu nghỉ dưỡng này cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi thể thao đa dạng để bạn có thể tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thú vị. Trong số đó, có sân golf, trung tâm thể dục, sân tennis, hồ bơi ngoài trời và quầy bar bên hồ bơi. Bạn cũng có thể tham gia chơi bóng bàn, thuê thiết bị thể thao nước, lặn biển hay tham gia trò chơi mini golf. Khu vực trang bị đầy đủ các dụng cụ lặn và snorkeling, đảm bảo bạn có thể khám phá vẻ đẹp dưới lòng biển. Ngoài ra, trung tâm thể dục hoạt động 24/7 và miễn phí, giúp bạn duy trì lối sống lành mạnh và năng động trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi tiện lợi để đảm bảo khách hàng có một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái và tiện lợi. Khách sạn có dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giúp khách hàng có thể đặt món ăn và đồ uống ngay tại phòng mọi lúc trong ngày. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là, dịch vụ phòng và hộp đựng đồ an toàn để đảm bảo an ninh cho tài sản của khách hàng.

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort cũng có dịch vụ concierge chuyên nghiệp, giúp khách hàng có thể tìm hiểu và đặt tour du lịch, đặt vé máy bay hoặc đặt bàn tại các nhà hàng nổi tiếng trong khu vực. Khách sạn cung cấp Wi-Fi miễn phí không chỉ trong phòng mà còn cả ở các khu vực công cộng. Nếu bạn là người hút thuốc, khách sạn cũng có khu vực riêng dành cho hút thuốc.

Khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là, dịch vụ làm khô, dịch vụ nhận phòng nhanh và trả phòng nhanh, dịch vụ giữ hành lý và dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày để đảm bảo sự tiện lợi và thoải mái cho khách hàng.

Tiện ích vận chuyển tại Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort cung cấp nhiều tiện ích vận chuyển để đảm bảo du khách có một kỳ nghỉ tiện lợi và thoải mái. Resort này cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp du khách dễ dàng di chuyển từ sân bay đến khu nghỉ mát một cách thuận tiện và nhanh chóng. Ngoài ra, du khách cũng có thể tham gia các tour du lịch được tổ chức bởi resort để khám phá vẻ đẹp của thành phố Krabi.

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort cũng có dịch vụ đỗ xe trực tiếp tại khuôn viên, bao gồm dịch vụ valet parking và bãi đỗ xe. Du khách có thể thuê xe hoặc sử dụng dịch vụ xe đưa đón của resort để di chuyển trong khu vực. Nếu muốn tự lái, resort cũng có bãi đỗ xe miễn phí cho du khách. Bên cạnh đó, du khách cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ taxi để di chuyển một cách thuận tiện và nhanh chóng trong thành phố Krabi.

Tiện nghi phòng tại Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort

Khám phá tiện nghi phòng tại Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort, nơi bạn sẽ được tận hưởng những trải nghiệm thú vị và thoải mái nhất. Mỗi phòng đều được trang bị hệ thống điều hòa không khí hiện đại, giúp bạn tận hưởng không gian trong lành và thoải mái suốt cả ngày. Bên cạnh đó, bạn còn có thể tận hưởng sự thoải mái với bộ áo choàng tắm mềm mại và tiện lợi. 

Để giúp bạn cảm thấy như ở nhà, khách sạn cung cấp báo hàng ngày và máy sấy tóc trong phòng. Bạn cũng có thể thư giãn và giải trí với màn hình TV và dịch vụ truyền hình cáp/satellite. Ngoài ra, minibar được cung cấp trong phòng, giúp bạn có thể thưởng thức đồ uống và đồ ăn nhẹ mọi lúc. Cuối cùng, hãy tận hưởng không gian riêng tư và tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp từ ban công hoặc hòn non bộ của bạn.

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort - Một trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích ẩm thực đa dạng và tinh tế. Resort này cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi ẩm thực đẳng cấp, bao gồm dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, quán cà phê, nhà hàng và dịch vụ phòng.

Khách sạn có một quán cà phê, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức những ly cà phê thơm ngon và thư giãn trong không gian thoáng đãng. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức các món ăn đa dạng và hấp dẫn, hãy đến nhà hàng của khách sạn. Tại đây, bạn sẽ được trải nghiệm những món ăn ngon miệng từ các đầu bếp tài ba. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giúp bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon mọi lúc mọi nơi.

Nếu bạn muốn tổ chức một buổi tiệc ngoài trời, khách sạn còn có các tiện ích BBQ. Tận hưởng không gian xanh mát và thoải mái, bạn có thể tổ chức một buổi tiệc BBQ cùng gia đình và bạn bè. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, nhà hàng halal và bữa sáng tự chọn. Với những tiện nghi ẩm thực đa dạng và chất lượng, Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort sẽ mang đến cho bạn những trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời.

Khám Phá Các Loại Phòng Đẳng Cấp Tại Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort

Tại Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng đa dạng phù hợp với mọi nhu cầu nghỉ dưỡng. Từ phòng Superior King rộng 45 mét vuông với giường King lớn, đến các suite cao cấp như Pool Suite hay Prestige Suite, mỗi loại phòng đều mang lại trải nghiệm sang trọng và thoải mái. Các phòng này không chỉ có diện tích rộng rãi mà còn mang đến tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp ra hồ bơi, vườn cây xanh mướt hoặc biển cả, giúp quý khách tận hưởng không gian nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng.
Ngoài ra, resort còn cung cấp các loại phòng đặc biệt như Junior Suite, Family Room, và các phòng Suite hai phòng ngủ phù hợp cho gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn đông người. Mỗi phòng đều được thiết kế để mang lại sự tiện nghi tối đa, giúp quý khách có những khoảnh khắc thư giãn tuyệt vời bên người thân yêu.
Khi đặt phòng qua Agoda, bạn sẽ nhận được mức giá tốt nhất cùng quy trình đặt phòng nhanh chóng, dễ dàng và không gặp phiền hà. Hãy tận dụng ưu đãi đặc biệt để có trải nghiệm lưu trú đẳng cấp tại Sofitel Krabi mà không cần lo lắng về giá cả hay thủ tục đặt phòng phức tạp.

Khám phá Klong Muang - Một thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng tại Krabi

Klong Muang là một bãi biển tuyệt đẹp nằm ở phía bắc của Krabi, Thái Lan. Với cát trắng mịn, nước biển trong xanh và không khí trong lành, Klong Muang là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thư giãn và đẳng cấp.

Nằm gần Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort, Klong Muang còn nổi tiếng với các hoạt động vui chơi thú vị như lướt sóng, lặn biển và cắm trại trên bãi biển. Du khách cũng có thể tham gia vào các tour du lịch khám phá các hòn đảo xung quanh như đảo Hong, đảo Phi Phi và đảo Lanta.

Ngoài ra, khu vực xung quanh Klong Muang còn có nhiều nhà hàng, quán cà phê và cửa hàng đặc sản nổi tiếng, mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm ẩm thực độc đáo. Với vẻ đẹp tự nhiên tuyệt vời và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp, Klong Muang là điểm đến không thể bỏ qua khi đến Krabi.

Hướng dẫn di chuyển từ sân bay đến Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort là một kỳ quan nghỉ dưỡng nằm ở Klong Muang, Krabi, Thái Lan. Để đến đây từ sân bay, bạn có một số phương tiện di chuyển để lựa chọn.

Nếu bạn muốn di chuyển bằng xe buýt công cộng, bạn có thể lấy xe buýt từ sân bay Krabi đến Klong Muang. Đây là một lựa chọn tiết kiệm và thuận tiện. Tuy nhiên, nếu bạn muốn di chuyển nhanh chóng và thoải mái hơn, bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ taxi hoặc xe đưa đón của khách sạn. Đây là lựa chọn phổ biến và tiện lợi cho du khách.

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort nằm cách sân bay Krabi khoảng 30 phút lái xe. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón từ sân bay, vì vậy bạn có thể đặt trước và chờ đón tại sân bay. Điều này giúp bạn tiết kiệm thời gian và nỗ lực trong việc tìm đường đi. Hãy chuẩn bị cho chuyến du lịch tuyệt vời và thư giãn tại Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort!

Khám phá các điểm tham quan gần Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort nằm gần một số điểm tham quan nổi tiếng tại Krabi, Thái Lan. Khách sạn chỉ cách Bãi biển Khlong Muang và Bãi biển Tubkaak trong khoảng cách ngắn, cho phép du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận với những bãi biển tuyệt đẹp và nước biển trong xanh.

Ngoài ra, Chalamkhow Muay thai là một điểm đến thú vị cho những ai yêu thích võ thuật Thái Lan. Du khách có thể tận hưởng những buổi trình diễn võ thuật đầy kịch tính và tham gia vào các lớp học để học hỏi thêm về nghệ thuật này.

Khách sạn cũng gần Koh Kwang Beach, Sathani Anamai Khlong Muang và KoDaeng, những điểm đến tuyệt vời để thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian biển xanh mát. Nếu bạn muốn khám phá thêm vẻ đẹp tự nhiên của Krabi, hãy đến Laem Bong Beach và Địa điểm du lịch Laem Hang Nak, nơi bạn có thể tham quan các khu vực đồng cỏ xanh mướt và ngắm nhìn toàn cảnh địa phương từ trên cao.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort nằm trong khu vực có nhiều lựa chọn nhà hàng hấp dẫn. Du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đa dạng tại Pakwan Restaurant & Bar, Mother House Bar and Restaurant, Saing Restaurant & Bar, Indian restaurant Coffee Club, Krabi, Masala Delight, The Naga Terrace Restaurant, Royal Tandoor, Limoncello, Panyaah Halal Food và Baan Rim Nam Restaurant. Với sự đa dạng về ẩm thực, du khách có thể tìm thấy những món ăn phù hợp với khẩu vị của mình, từ ẩm thực Thái Lan truyền thống đến món ăn Ấn Độ tuyệt vời. Những nhà hàng này cũng cung cấp không gian thoải mái và phục vụ chuyên nghiệp, tạo nên một trải nghiệm ẩm thực đáng nhớ.

Mua sắm tại Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort có vị trí thuận lợi gần các khu mua sắm nổi tiếng như Klong Muang Plaza và Klong Muang Sunday and Tuesday Market. Klong Muang Plaza là một trung tâm mua sắm lớn với nhiều cửa hàng và quầy bán hàng đa dạng, từ quần áo, đồ điện tử cho đến đồ lưu niệm. Bạn cũng có thể tìm thấy những món đồ thủ công độc đáo và các sản phẩm nông sản tươi ngon tại Klong Muang Sunday and Tuesday Market. Với vị trí tuyệt vời và sự đa dạng của các khu mua sắm xung quanh, Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort là một điểm dừng lý tưởng cho những ai muốn mua sắm và khám phá văn hóa địa phương.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort so với giá phòng trung bình tại cùng thành phố

Với giá phòng trung bình là $237, Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ sang trọng và đẳng cấp ở Krabi. So với giá phòng trung bình tại thành phố là $99, giá phòng tại resort này có vẻ cao hơn một chút. Tuy nhiên, đối với những tiện nghi và dịch vụ đẳng cấp mà khách sạn này cung cấp, giá trị của nó hoàn toàn xứng đáng. Với không gian xanh mát, sân golf chuyên nghiệp, spa thư giãn và các nhà hàng đa dạng, Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort mang đến một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời cho du khách.

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort - Nơi lý tưởng cho cả gia đình và cặp đôi

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort là một kỳ quan với hồ bơi rộng lớn và đội ngũ nhân viên nhiệt tình và thân thiện. Khách sạn này thực sự tuyệt vời cho cả gia đình và cặp đôi. Tài sản này rất tốt và rất đẹp. Vị trí tuyệt vời, sạch sẽ và thoáng mát. Nhân viên luôn sẵn lòng giúp đỡ và khách sạn được vệ sinh rất tốt. Bạn sẽ yêu thích không khí cổ điển của khu nghỉ dưỡng này. Con cái chúng tôi rất thích khu vui chơi dành cho trẻ em và các hoạt động tại đây. Nhà hàng trong khuôn viên và đồ ăn tại đây cũng rất tuyệt vời.

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort - Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời với đánh giá tốt từ khách hàng

Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn có một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Krabi, Thái Lan. Khách sạn đã nhận được đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng với mức điểm tổng thể là 8.3/10. Đánh giá cao nhất là cho các tiện nghi và dịch vụ tại khách sạn, với điểm số ấn tượng là 8.9/10. 

Khách sạn Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort không chỉ là một nơi nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng mà còn mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời với đội ngũ nhân viên chuyên nghiệp và tận tâm. Đánh giá về hiệu suất của nhân viên đạt điểm số 8.8/10, cho thấy sự chất lượng và sự phục vụ tốt nhất từ đội ngũ nhân viên tại đây. 

Khách sạn Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort cũng được đánh giá cao về sạch sẽ với điểm số ấn tượng là 8.9/10. Du khách có thể yên tâm tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ mà không phải lo lắng về vấn đề vệ sinh. Dù vị trí của khách sạn được đánh giá tương đối ở mức 7.3/10, nhưng nhờ vào các tiện ích và dịch vụ tuyệt vời, khách sạn này vẫn là sự lựa chọn hàng đầu của du khách khi đến Krabi.

sample_comments.text: Đây là nơi yêu thích mới của chúng tôi ở Krabi. Liệu có hoàn hảo cho một khách sạn 5 sao không? Không! Không có ổ cắm nào trong phòng hoạt động và tất cả đều cũ. Nhân viên tại nhà hàng bể bơi rất chậm. Nhưng.....khuôn viên rất tuyệt vời. Thức ăn thường rất ngon, bữa sáng cũng vậy. Mặc dù lạc hậu nhưng các phòng rất rộng rãi và thoải mái. Sàn phòng tắm màu vàng không làm chúng tôi bận tâm! Vị trí.....có thể không phù hợp với những người muốn một bữa tiệc nhưng chúng tôi yêu bãi biển đẹp ngay trước mặt với các nhà hàng dọc theo bờ biển. Ngay trước khách sạn trên bãi biển, bạn có thể thuê một chiếc thuyền dài riêng ra đảo Hong với nửa giá so với Ao Nang. Nó yên tĩnh và đẹp nhưng bạn có thể bắt taxi đến Ao Nang trong 15 phút! Phòng gym được trang bị đầy đủ. Câu lạc bộ trẻ em rất xuất sắc. Quán bar Explorer thật tuyệt vào buổi tối với nhạc sống! Đừng mong đợi sự sang trọng 5 sao nhưng hãy mong đợi có một khoảng thời gian tuyệt vời ở đây.
sample_comments.title: Đừng ở Ao Nang! Hãy ở đây.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour Sarah,
Sawasdee Kha.

Thank you very much for sharing your detailed feedback following your stay with us. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our beautiful beach, spacious rooms, excellent kids club, and vibrant evening atmosphere at Explorer Bar. Your kind words about our grounds and breakfast are truly appreciated.

At the same time, we apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with the room sockets and the service at the pool restaurant. Please be assured that your comments have been shared with the respective teams for improvement.

It is wonderful to know that, despite these points, you found your overall stay enjoyable and would recommend our tranquil location as a base for exploring Krabi. We hope to welcome you and your family back soon for another memorable stay.

Warm regards,

Siripun Petchai
Guest Experience Manager
Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf & Spa Resort

sample_comments.title: I will never recommend the Sofitel Krabi hotel to any traveler. Do not go. I am so angry with them
sample_comments.text:
On Jan 4 I was scheduled to stay at this hotel for 2 nights. This is not the first time I stayed here. I stayed here back in 2016 and at the time I thought the hotel was ok. 

I decided to try again and give them another chance. I booked a room and saved up for almost a year for our vacation. I have a 2 year old who has a condition so I chose this hotel because on the web site it seemed good with kids.

Little did I realize. On Jan 4 Krabi had a storm warning. Largest storm in 30 years. Anyway the hotel was not undertanding of my family. Gave me horrible response and did not appreciate that my little child had a condition. 

I hate this hotel. I will NEVER EVER go there again.
sample_comments.response: Dear William, thank you for taking your time to share your review. We understand that you are very concerned with the storm warning, however, as we informed you by e-mail that the storm has not impacted during your upcoming period of stay. Therefore, we hope you understand also that we were unable to modify the booking via third party as per terms and conditions.We sincerely hope that you will give us another opportunity to welcome you again.

Your staff don't allow us to check in as there are 5 members and we only booked 1 room.The room was booked by my girl and I thought she booked a 2 single bed and all of us can stay in by adding an extra bed. We were than asked to ger another room and without hesitation i agreed but the rate was higher than Agoda's rate. The rate offer are way too high for the second room, therefore I suggest that I have to book thru Agoda again. After the booking my child made a mistake by stating only 1 person is staying and again we have to argue the rate again. After much negotiation we have to pay extra 2000bt plus but without breakfast even i requested. I commented to the manager there that we are here for holiday and the policies are too strict. The whole scenario have cost us 1hrs plus.
I find that your policies are too tight. I was disappointed that I have to go back to Agoda again to make another booking leaving us damsel in distress whereby they can just charge me accordingly on Agoda,s rate?
Neither will I recommend friends. 
The rooms are not fully supply with toiletrie and we have to keep requesting everyday.
Thanks.

We hope that the rest of your stay was not tainted by the room issue and that you will give us another opportunity to welcome you again in the future.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Property is expansive and grounds are well maintained. Especially a good choice for families with kids (even teenagers). Pool is a bit too big and spread across a large area with kid friendly areas as well but not shaded at all and the pool is not temperature controlled so the water is very hot. The location is a bit removed and isolated, without a vehicle it is difficult to commute. It is not a beach property, one has to cross the road to actually get to the beach and it is a public beach so not so well maintained. We were there during the solar eclipse and the beach was infested with dead jelly fish, which means the water must a lot so need to be especially careful with kids. Rooms are large and well appointed & comfortable.
sample_comments.negatives: The resort needs to seriously update their food game. The breakfast spread is huge but the experience is a bit chaotic, lot of people and uncleared tables and kids screaming so we dreaded to go down everyday. The menus across the restaurants and the poolside needs an update, it is either fast food or then some run of the mill dishes that is available every other touristy places. No focus on local ingredients or dishes. We ordered a chicken with cashew nuts and chicken green curry through room service and it was the worst thai food we have had in thailand and we are huge fans of thai food. The chicken was grilled in large chunks and just added to a green curry topped with a loooooooot...of baby eggplants and same for the other chicken dish - grilled chicken topped with a sauce - we were extremely disappointed with the selection of thai food in the property. In fact on the last afternoon of our stay the pool bar did not even have fresh coconuts in stock!!!!

sample_comments.title: Bad Experience
sample_comments.text:
Had food poisoning from lunch at the pool bar, even though they sent someone to my room with medicine nobody bothered to check how I was. The lunch was fully charged and I didn't hear an apology from anyone. I paid the mount in full, too exhausted to complain, it wasn't about the money but the expectation you have from a 5-star hotel.

Hotel is right next to a gypsum mine, there was a large vessel loading. No question about swimming in the sea, forget it. Luckily you don't see the vessel loading from the hotel, only from the main road.

They put us on the ground floor, initially it was nice since you could directly walk to the pool from the room, but there was a foul disgusting smell when they were watering the plants, a combination of sewage and manure. Again, complained but nothing, not even an apology. 

Worst vacation ever

sample_comments.title: The resort looks tired...
sample_comments.text: The hotel is poorly located. It is not beach front as the pictures might suggest. A road divides the beach and the hotel, and the beach is less than ideal. F&B is disappointing. With only one pricey Italian restaurant available to hotel guests while the all day dining restaurant is often booked for private corporate events. Rent a scooter and escape!
sample_comments.positives: Clean rooms. Functional gym. Big premise.

sample_comments.title: A mistake not to be repeated
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is located across a road from a thin strip of bad beach. Not attractive. It is far enough away from any competitive restaurants that the guests have no practical alternatives to the hotel restaurants, which are overpriced and mediocre.

Thai people seem to shun this hotel. The only Thai I saw worked at the hotel, not guests. The clientele is almost all Northern European and Australian. The Euro people claim the pool side lounge chairs by 10 am. They toss a few towels and personal items on the chairs then go somewhere else. Maybe they use the chairs during the day, maybe not, but they do exclude others from using them all day.

Don't buy the pool side buffet dinners - don't waste your money.
sample_comments.positives: Leaving, leaviing, and leaving

sample_comments.text: The property and the service is very good, however the amenities like the TV, shower extra could be refurbished.

sample_comments.title: Location are far and rooms are small
sample_comments.text: we reached sofitel at around 3pm. it took us more than 1 hrs to check in. upon checking in your staff requested us to book another room bcos they don't allow us all to stay in one room. this booking was book by my child and i though she has booked a double single bed room and i thought by adding an extra bed will do. without hesitation i agreed for to take another room but was shocked as they refuse to give me agoda's rate as the rate she offered was too high. i negotiated with her she can't make any decision at all on every request i made, everytime she has to make a phon call on my request. finally i decided to book thru agoda again, she than lead me to the room for booking. again my child made a mistake by clicking 1 perrson staying on 1 room. i thought everything are solved as we booked 2 rooms for 5 person staying. this time a senior japanese manager spoke to us asking us to pay exta 4000bt plus for 2nd person stay. i told her we come for holiday and her policies are so strick! finally we settle for 2000bt plus and strictly without breakfast knowing is far to travel to town for breakfast. before this i was staying in rachadamri grand central, we book a suite and we were only request to book an extra bed and we were rewarded 5 complementary breakfast and 3 for following days. i will definitely go back to rachadamri to stsy bcos they know how to please costomers but nor sofitel. neither will i recomend any friends.
sample_comments.positives: Swimming pool

sample_comments.title: Disappointed by Poor Service and Lack of Safety
sample_comments.text: Our 3-night stay was far from relaxing. From the start, service was lacking---I requested ice at check-in, followed up multiple times, and only received it nearly 3 hours later after I went to the front desk myself. On the second day, a large corporate group, reportedly from Axis Life Insurance (India), arrived and caused continuous disruption. Their loud, drunken behavior near the children's pool forced families to leave, and hotel staff seemed powerless to intervene. Breakfast was chaotic due to their shouting and disorderly conduct. Worst of all, on the final night, we were woken by yelling and someone trying to open our door. Management admitted they only had 3 security guards for nearly 300 rooms and couldn't control the situation. This stay felt unsafe and mismanaged. I have submitted a formal complaint and expect a full apology and compensation.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour Khun Maneenush,
Sawasdee kha,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay at Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf & Spa Resort.

We sincerely regret to learn that your experience did not meet expectations and caused you such inconvenience. Please accept our heartfelt apologies for the delays in service, the disturbances you experienced during your stay, and the overall discomfort this caused your family.

Your comments have been taken very seriously and have been shared with the relevant departments for immediate review. Most importantly, our General Manager, Mr. Jonathan Rudd, has been made aware of your feedback and will be reaching out to you personally via email to further address your concerns.

Once again, thank you for bringing these matters to our attention. We truly appreciate your candid feedback, as it helps us to improve and ensure a more seamless experience for all guests.

Warm regards,

Siripun Petchai
Guest Experience Man

sample_comments.title: Not value for money
sample_comments.text: Overall, very dissapointed with property. While property is big with 2 key attractions - a very big swimming pool and a large golf course. But they have made all their facilities (except pool) as chargeable. On top the room rates are anyways quite high. The beach is also not ideal with small stones in the beach. Even the housekeeping services are very slow. The restaurant opening timings are very limited and 2 out of 3 restaurants open only during evening hours. The in room dining options are very limited. Will not reccommend this property especially considering high price.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour Bharat,

Sawasdee Kha! Thank you very much for staying with us during your recent trip to Krabi and for taking time to share your review on Agoda.com.

We have well noted your feedback. Please accept our apologies for any inconvenience caused and rest assured that we will review each point in detail and take corrective actions.

Once again, thanks for sharing your experience and wishing you a Magnifique journey onwards. 

Yours sincerely,

Siripun Petchai 
Guest Experience Manager - Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf & Spa Resort.

sample_comments.title: Overhyped
sample_comments.text:
Great pool and good service. Breakfast is diverse as well.

Rooms are dated. For a Sofitel surprisingly the rooms weren't anything special. Location is far off from everything. So activities and even car access is limited. On site travel arrangements are almost 3 times what the outside is offering. I think you can go to other resorts in more central locations.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour Sadia, 

Sawasdee Kha! Thank you very much for staying with us during your recent trip to Krabi and for taking time to share your review on Agoda.com.

Glad to know that you appreciated our gigantic pool, service, and breakfast. Nevertheless, your feedback about the room experience, activities and car access is noted. Please rest assured that we will review each point in detail in order to achieve further improvements. 

In the meantime, we also note your comment in relation to the price of our tours and excursion trips, we are sure that you would appreciate that as a luxury hotel we have many high operational costs to enable us to provide our the most memorable experiences with well-trained Heartists. We cannot compete with local businesses and our guests' expectations are definitely very different.

Look forward to welcoming you back to our beautiful resort. 

Yours sincerely,

Siripun Petchai 
Guest Experience Manager - Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf & Spa Resort.

sample_comments.title: travel
sample_comments.text: The hotel has an amazingly large swimming pool, and the rooms are large and clean. The fly in the ointment is the restaurant. There is a small insect in my dinner pumpkin soup. After telling the waiter, the waiter did not replace a new soup but removed the insect and gave the soup to me. This is not a service that a five-star hotel should have. Feel disappointed.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour 'PEI',

Sawasdee kha. Warm greetings from Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf and Spa Resort. 
Thank you very much for staying with us during your recent trip to Krabi and for taking time to review your visit to our beautiful resort. 

Glad to know that you appreciated our facilities in particular the gigantic pool and the room. Nevertheless, your feedback about your food and beverage experience has been noted and shared with our Director of Culinary who will discuss the matter with the team promptly in order to make a corrective action. Please accept our apologies for any inconvenience caused.

Guest Experience is the top priority at Sofitel Krabi, sorry that we let you down in certain areas this time. we sincerely hope that you will give us another opportunity to better serve you again in the future.

Yours sincerely,

Siripun Petchai 
Guest Experience Manager - Sofitel Krabi Phokeetrha Golf & Spa Resort.

Great swimming pool but service at the pool bar was slow almost pedestrian and if they ran out of something rather than go to the main building and replace the item it was just not available
Very isolated so be prepared to eat in the hotel

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast was pretty good for a 4* hotel. Unfortunately lacked sea food, however variety is great. If you are eating clean, enough choice to enjoy it
sample_comments.negatives:
Grossly overpriced for the facilities. Needs major updating in every sense. Aircon is so dirty that I had to drive to a store, buy duck tape and plastic bags to block the dirty dusty air blowing into the room. Even after I blocked it, air still would come thru the cracks around it that made me cough all 7 days non stop from it. Dinner was crap, portions laughably small and everything is fried in oil. Choice on dinner is incredibly limited, had to eat pizza for 7 days straight since everything else was deep fried utter crap and after ordering a crab, I had an empty shell brought to the table. Half board is a scam, offers on the menu specifically excluded half boarders. Price tag very high for it as well.

There's no beach you can swim, water very murky and muddy. Staff was not very welcoming. I don't wanna go on since it would get objectively much worse.

I have stayed as much nicer places around for half price.

sample_comments.title: Not worth the money - overrated
sample_comments.text: This is a not the standard I expected from a 440$/ night hotel and especially not a Sofitel, it just has the name. When we arrived, the staff at the pool bar/restaurant did not want to serve food because it was apparently too late and the kitchen closed at 5pm but it was 4.45pm and the reception had told us we could eat there. No communication between them and after they finally agreed to serve food they were just unhelpful. Then we wanted to go for a spa treatment but it was apparently fully booked and when we asked again at reception suddenly it was not. Shame that they have those facilities but the service is not there. Rooms are ok but bathrooms are getting quite old. The redeeming feature is the breakfast. Overall I would not go back and neither would I recommend to pay such a premium for this hotel.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour 'A',

Thank you for taking your time to share your review. We regret that your recent stay in some areas fell below your expectations. Rest assured that this information has been shared with the respective department heads to follow up with their team. We do apologize for the inconvenience caused. Nevertheless, we are glad that you enjoyed the variety of our breakfast. We will also share your kind feedback with the team. We do hope that you provide us with the opportunity to welcome you back sometime in the future to hopefully restore your faith in Sofitel Krabi.

Yours Sincerely,

Poorit Nookua
Guest Experience Manager - Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf & Spa Resort

sample_comments.title: Great location, great staff, many hidden costs.
sample_comments.positives: The Hotels is great when you get there, the staff very friendly and helpful. The Hotel has great facilities, and we really enjoyed our stay at the Hotel. There are a number of F&B options that allows variety and when you stay for an extended time you don't have to eat the same food over and over. The facilities are well maintained and probably as clean as can be expected.
sample_comments.negatives:
Being in the Hospitality industry myself I understand the challenges and can let many things slide. I know how difficult it is to run a resort however there were a few things to note:
1. Golf: The add stated an 18-hole golf course. it is actually a 9-hole meshy course (par 3 course). We had to rent a set of clubs for myself and my son EACH (was made clear these are the rules, can't share), yet we still had to share because the clubs are incomplete (missing clubs), and they only had female clubs (no metal stiff shaft clubs). All the water holes are empty and under maintenance (this was not indicated during booking). The staff told us how important it is to book since they are very busy in the morning, yet after spending 2 hours on the course from 9am the morning... we were the only people on the course.
2. Meals: We took the half board package but was told that the evening we arrived that there would be no evening buffet anymore. we had to book and use the Italian, Indian or Thia restaurant that you could only select 2 items (for Indian and Thai) and 3 from the Italian menu. Typically, in all other hotels we stayed half board included local alcohol, soft drinks and water, here NOTHING was included, and we had to pay extra for EVERYTHING. Again, not made clear when making the booking.
3. Arrival: It all started on the wrong note when we were left stranded at the airport when nobody showed up from the arrange airport collection. Phoning took 30min only to hear yeh we can't find your airport transfer and was told... use a taxi. Arriving at the Hotel and it was just swept under the carpet.
4. Pool Bar: staff GREAT, service GREAT, they can do with a shade in the pool for the pool bar, there is only a small section that has shading, and everybody huddled in there to get out of the baking sun. Additionally, the poor bartender was dripping of sweat and could do with a few fans in the bar to keep in cool as well.

sample_comments.title: We arrived at the hotel via taxi as the hotel Does not provide free shuttle service. The staff were
sample_comments.text:
The staff were welcoming and warm and assist in our check in promptly. However we were allocate a room at the far end - takes 10 mins to walk to the room. Nevertheless the room was big and nice view. All was alright except that the door cannot be double locked. And worse morning the toilet bowl was choked . So before we go to Ao Nang we made a request at the conceirge to change room
And was informed that was one available
And waiting for the customer to check out. 
After we came back from the town which is after 3pm, we will told that there is no other rooms available imagine the disappointment. 
But the reception lady was kind and search one for me but it's a superior room and I have booked the luxury room. How can right 
So we waited in the room and after 3 calls they finally confirm that there is one room just 8 doors away from lobby.So happily we moved our luggage and went to the new room. 
This room at 108 was good and we can just leave from the back door to the pool. Bit
sample_comments.response: Daer Tan, thank you for taking your time to tell us about your experience at Sofitel Krabi. We regret that you encountered the inconvenience during your recent visit, however, we are glad that the issues were handled already by our Ambassadors. We hope that the rest of your stay was not tainted by the room issue and that you will give us another opportunity to welcome you again in the future.

sample_comments.title: Alright...service levels need to improve.
sample_comments.positives: The property is very huge. Easy access to the beach and restaurants outside. Friendly staff. Breakfast was very good.
sample_comments.negatives:
Service was very slow. 
The fan was not working in our room and even after informing the room service, no one came to fix it. 
Had asked for an early check in and late check out - neither happened. All 5 star hotels that I have been to do provide some relaxation on check in / check out - but did not happen with Sofitel. In fact this is my first stay at Sofitel.

sample_comments.title: Bad toilet function
sample_comments.text:
We stayed 2 nights but the toilet was blocked twice. It has really big problem for the toilet.
Besides, hotel did not provide shaver or refill toiletries, need to call and request

For the used towel, hotel did not take out , still keep in our room

Breakfast is really bad, no choices, taste bad
Staff will not serve you or take away the used plate, staff pour all the used soup in one bowl in front of us, it's so disgusting and like eating on street shops. Service is 2 or 3 star hotel

We won't stay this hotel again

Your remark has been carefully noted and I can assure you the necessary steps have been taken to avoid such inconveniences in the future. sample_comments.title: Place for couples, not for family with todller
sample_comments.positives: Location, architecture
sample_comments.negatives: Sold as family friendly with complementary kids club, actually half of activities at the kids club are not free. Scheduled in such a way that parents have to pay...staff at kids club not much involved with kids, hence clubs d always empty as kids are bored.

sample_comments.title: Ok get away but not so value for money
sample_comments.text:
The rooms were average for the money we pay. Staff keeps on forgetting to refill amenities and once rolled back used napkin with utensil. We got a junior suite room which was nice but the hotel put us at the furthest part of the hotel. Breakfast was average. The variety of fruit juice was a treat but way too sweet. 
There was a list full of adult and kids activities which I think was pretty good. 
Location wise was a bit far from town; beach not so clean 
Morning trip to Koh Hong disappointing. No sight of clear water or fish; we hired a private long tail boat but driver disappeared and we had to wait a rocky dock for 20 minutes. 
I have to say the staff was friendly the people in Krabi in general is friendly. The pool is ok way too hot needs for shades.
sample_comments.response: Dear Jenny. we appreciate your positive feedback about our hotel. We take pride in catering to our guests' needs the best way we can. If you're traveling to our area again soon, don't hesitate to contact us.

sample_comments.title: Good and Bad Experiences
sample_comments.text:
The bad things about Sofitel in Krabi are:
1. The other Duty Manager (she is a Thai woman) is definitely not a customer service oriented person. She was not helpful and unpleasant to speak with.
2. My wife's rayban was stolen inside her bag in our room when the housekeeping did their job on our first morning at Sofitel. No proper investigation was done nor a follow up. We had to let go of the situation.
3. The beach was not good and should not be considered a beach front hotel.
sample_comments.positives: The good things about Sofitel in Krabi are its big reception/lobby area, good food at the Indian/ Thai restaurant and very good staff like Annie and Sam - who were genuinely nice and helpful to us.

sample_comments.title: dont stay during or after a wedding
sample_comments.text: we booked a pool and sea view room but firstly was put in a side way just seeing a bit of the sea, then after 5 calls and waiting in 4 hours, we managed to shift into another side which this time can only see a bit of the kid pool but no sea. so, it is not a pool and sea view but just pool or sea view. obviously they have some problem with the agreement together agoda,and i bet all the room you booked here has the same problem. besides, the hotel was not well maintained after 500+ head indian wedding, the staff all looked so tired and so does the facility. so, please call and make sure there is no wedding before or after if you don't want join the big party. actually, heard from the staff it is frequently holding such weddings or conference and personally feel they don't care enough the individual travelers. this area is very rural and nothing to see or eat, unless you would like to eat all day in the hotel and go nowhere but just the huge pool.

sample_comments.title: Poor management in the hotel
sample_comments.text: During our stay it was a wedding preparation, so the mangement of the hotel decided to turn off Jacuzzi pool in one part of the hotel and in fact a part of swimming pool was closed also because of a preparation process to wedding and decorating trees, pool and so on. It was very unpleasant for us to be the guests of the hotel and to get such a poor service in these days. Nobody in the hotel said nothing to the guests about future wedding, nobody apologized in advance for any inconvenience this may cause. So, for me it is a very poor service in this hotel. I was in the hotel in 2012 and it was much more better in service that time. Now it is a hotel with a big pool, nothing more.

However, the transportation from town and other point just hard to get proper taxi.. they use the private car at the taxi to pic up guess at the road site...as a guess we do not know is that secure or not. Hope it ca be improve. Overall stay i rate 5 star.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel no more than that
sample_comments.positives: Rated as 5 star hotel but it is very basic with medium service dose not worth the money

sample_comments.title: Great hotel shame about the location
sample_comments.text:
This is such a lovely hotel but the location is not as good as the Sheraton. You have to cross the road to the beach (although there are staff to help you cross and beach towels). The road is very busy with heavy trucks which makes it dangerous to walk anywhere with small children. We stayed at the Sheraton a few years ago and the beach was part of the hotel and there were shops and restaurants at the hotel entrance. The Sofitel is no better than this but with a worse location where there is a 10-15 minute walk with no pavement along a busy road to the nearest shop and restaurant outside the hotel. 
Having said that, the staff are lovely, the food is nice and the kids club was fun.
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful pool, good breakfast, nice room

sample_comments.title: good
sample_comments.text: good but too far from downtown so taxi was bit expensive
sample_comments.positives: service, food, view

sample_comments.title: good
sample_comments.positives: nice view, huge pool & close to the beach

sample_comments.title: Lovely Hotel But in the Wrong Location
sample_comments.text: My husband and I stayed here after Christmas for 3 nights and although the hotel itself was lovely we were very disappointed with its location. The beach is unusable and across a busy road. Our rooms were on the top floor and even then we could only get a glimpse of the ocean. The nearest town is 30 kms away and the pool although large the beds offered no shade. The umbrellas were held down with 100 kilo ornaments! It was not at all what I had in mind and I would not recommend it to anybody looking for a beach holiday in Krabi. There are lots of other hotels around which offer beach access with stunning views of the ocean
sample_comments.positives: Well Managed Clean Good Breakfast

sample_comments.title: Nice Hotel and good service
sample_comments.text:
Hotel per se is very nice and well kept. We had a seminar at the ballroom, wow power failure about 5 times a day. This is very disruptive and unacceptable. Transport is not good, must book in advance.
Van pickup was disappointing, the driver forget to pick guest and arrived late and guest had to take a taxi.
To go to the beach, you need to cross a main road. Sea is rough and plenty of rocks, not suitable for swimming. There is no good shop in and around this hotel. Without your own transport is no fun staying here. airport is 30 to 40 by taxi costing about 800 baht.
Quality of food and breakfast is 3 stars not 5. The gymn is really basic and below par, better to go for a run instead of using the gymn. 
The Spa very good but after 20% the price is 1800 baht is still pricy.
sample_comments.positives: Nice big room and airy lobby, nice swimming pool.

sample_comments.title: Poor Location far away not directly on the beach
sample_comments.text: This is a package tourist hotel perfect for family. Good service but standard rooms. Far away from the main sites in Krabi and not directly on the beach. The beach there is not good but the pool is huge and excellent for families with children. Not great for single or couple travelers as not much to do unless you rent a car. Was greatly disappointed.
sample_comments.positives: Good quality price

sample_comments.title: Nice, clean hotel but not much to do around
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at the Sofitel in Krabi as part of our honeymoon in February. The hotel's services were not as good and the staff not as kind as any of the places we stayed during our honeymoon (Phuket, Bali and Bangkok) We did not have breakfast at the hotel as it did not look good. 

The main thing we didn't like about the hotel is that the closest town is 15 minutes away. There's nothing to do around the hotel that is walking distance. The hotel knows this so they have a shuttle to the closest town but it's not frequent enough and not free. It really should be. . . We ended up taking hotel's shuttle (or a tuk tuk) to the town every night. 

They do offer a free boat tour to the Hong Island. That's probably the best thing about this hotel and a must. They do have a nice pool, a small beach front and many activities.
sample_comments.positives: Nice, clean rooms, many daily activities

sample_comments.title: Sofitel Phokeethra Krabi Resort & Spa
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is huge and sparsely build so you can have your privacy however the downside is you have to walk a long way if your rooms are right at the end.
The service is good. The hotel location is far , so good for honeymoons. If you want a piece of action Ao nang beach accomodation is a better choice.

sample_comments.title: Disappointed with stay
sample_comments.text: We arrived at the Sofitel with high expectations for good food and kind staff. The food was completely sub par! We've stayed at other Sofitel with fantastic food and this did not compare. Even their French pastries made by French chefs were not good. The staff seem overworked and were not helpful to customers. The servers in all the resterants seemed frazzled all the time, each one having too many tables. It always took 15 minutes or more to get even a drink at the restaurants. The pool was beautiful, but that was the only positive. We were in Thailand for two weeks and had fabulous service and food everywhere else we stayed. The Thai people are fantastic and helpful, however this hotel although in Thailand had very few Thai staff members. I would not recommend this hotel to anyone!

Overall good experience but pricing slightly on the higher side considering low season and not all-inclusive package provided (ie no breakfast)
sample_comments.response: Dear MOHD, we appreciate your positive feedback about our hotel. We take pride in catering to our guests' needs the best way we can. If you're traveling to our area again soon, don't hesitate to contact us.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives:
I recently stayed at the *Sofitel Krabi Phokeethra Golf & Spa Resort* and had a very relaxing experience. Here's a breakdown of the positives and negatives:

Positives
- The atmosphere was quiet and gave off an old-money luxurious feel, perfect for unwinding.
- The hotel offers a wide range of activities, and the architecture, especially in the lobby, is absolutely stunning.
- The front office staff were excellent, with special mention to Talia from guest relations and a wonderful intern from Cambodia (whose name I unfortunately forgot), both of whom were incredibly helpful and attentive.
- The rooms were spacious and well-appointed. I stayed on the 1st floor with a pool view, while my sister's room on the 2nd floor had a balcony facing the golf course.
- Meals were overall great, with dinner being the standout thanks to the delicious Thai cuisine.
- The pastries at breakfast were top-notch.
- The resort's location is peaceful, away from the noise of Ao Nang, but not completely isolated.

A special thanks to Talia for her help, including at a local 7/11, and for explaining the ongoing renovation process, which leaves me looking forward to returning after the updates.
sample_comments.negatives:
Negatives
- The hotel feels a bit outdated, particularly the bathrooms, where the water pressure was low and the shower head too small.
- The beach is not suitable for swimming, which might be disappointing for some.
- While dinner and breakfast pastries were great, breakfast options overall were limited, and room service wasn't up to the standard of the restaurants.
- Restaurant dishes were a bit pricey and came in smaller portions compared to typical Thai servings.

sample_comments.title: nice room but far from everything, cant see sea
sample_comments.text: Relax atmosphere but crowded with French tourist groups. The location is far from everything and the hotel transportation is overpriced.
sample_comments.positives: room, swimming pool and staffs

sample_comments.title: Needs alot of improvement.
sample_comments.positives: - the number of resturants and the facilites
sample_comments.negatives:
- location was far but no shuttles to the city. They infact wanted to charge for shuttles to the city which I thought is a cheap move for a 5* hotel. And that to more expensive than a normal taxi.

- the hotel definetly requires renovation. Much much need rooms upgrade from room to furniture to corridors. And im not comparing it to dubai standards we had a 14 days stay at 5 hotels.

- breakfast options HAD to be increased. More like a 3-4* hotel to me at best compared to other hotels in thailand

sample_comments.title: clean a lot of choice in breakfast but very far
sample_comments.text: We appreciated staying at the hotel although it's very far and expensive to go out
sample_comments.positives: clean beautiful good services

sample_comments.title: Lots of family activities available
sample_comments.text: Krabi is a very beautiful place to visit. Sofitel is a good hotel but it is rather old. We went at high season so the staffs were extremely busy. room amenities were often incomplete after room cleaning. The hotel manager was extremely helpful, recommending us various options for dining venue (as hotel restaurants were fully booked).
sample_comments.positives: Sofitel has the biggest swimming pool in Th. There are lots of activities for families with young children at the hotel.

sample_comments.title: Not convenient
sample_comments.text: Had to top up 1500Thai Baht per night for connecting rooms upon arrival. This was so as connecting rooms only available for superior room and luxury room. We had booked 2 superior rooms from Agoda. The only difference between the superior room and luxury room is an extra day bed. Bad start to our holidays. If we had knew this, we would not have book Sofitel.
sample_comments.positives: Kids' club, gymnasium and breakfast spread

sample_comments.title: Relaxing, isolated, great pool, ugly beach
sample_comments.text: Our family of 3 (14 year old daughter) stayed at the Sofitel for 4 days. The hotel was nice enough, quiet room, very large pool and quite decent restaurant. Hotel per se was quite cheap for the quality (thanks to Agoda) and offer an executive 9-hole golf course. We didnt play golf so I cant comment on the quality of the golf. The hotel is quite remote from the main hub which is Ao Nong. Therefore going to town for dinner or activities was quite expensive. A 10 minute ride in-town was 500 baht or about US $15 a whapping $30 for 20 minute cab ride. The hotel offered the transport to the city but it was more expensive than the local taxis. Overall a decent experience, but if you go book your tours directly from the shops in Ao Nong rather than at the hotel which charge a steep premium for the service of making a phone call to book the tour operators! Enjoy your travel!
sample_comments.positives: Clean and OK size room, superb pool and good restaurants

sample_comments.title: value for money but far from attractions
sample_comments.positives: Great Pool n pool bar

sample_comments.title: Comfortable & nice but far from central
sample_comments.text: The resort is very comfortable, staffs are very helpful & polite. It is very quiet & relax. It has very large swimming pool, pool side bar, rooms are relatively large with balcony. Ideal for those who want some peaceful & quiet life away from the cities. However, I would say it is located too far away from the central area. Unless you are planning to stay in the resort for all the time, it will be quite inconvenience & costly to travel to the central area for some local street food & shopping.
sample_comments.positives: Comfortable, quiet & relaxing

sample_comments.title: fairly
sample_comments.text: Hotel so may big i have to walk very far. i prefer smaller hotel and close to
sample_comments.positives: staff / swiming pool / nice room

sample_comments.title: Traditional Hotel with Huge Swimming Pool
sample_comments.text: We stayed one night at the Sofitel in Krabi on our way back to Bangkok from a tour of the southern Andaman islands. Its a beautiful, traditional hotel with all the gradeur you would expect from the Sofitel. The Swimming Pool is unbelievably huge (7000 m3) so if you like lazying by the pool and swimming all day... this is your address. Personally, we found it a little boring however after 2 weeks of island hopping and staying in various non-airco lodgings with little of no warm water, we were happy with the reliability of the Sofitel. The food at the pool bar was atrocious so we didn't try any of the other restaurants and went into Ao Nang for dinner. This would be a great hotel with kids and a hubby who likes to golf!
sample_comments.positives: Swimming Pool

sample_comments.title: nice & spacious
sample_comments.text: there's a great air of spaciousness and thus the air of relaxation within the hotel. The golf course also adds to this nice green quality. Service wasn't the most attentive, except for the housekeeping staff who do fantastic job. We didn't mind that we're out of the main Ao Nang area for the peace and quiet. The free speed boat trip to Hong Island is definitely worth doing.
sample_comments.positives: we had the luxury rooms, very spacious indeed
sample_comments.negatives: cleanliness of the pool, especially with its vast area, could be improved

sample_comments.title: B&B - Big and boring
sample_comments.text: I could not help it - I felt disappointed about the hotel considering the price of more than As such, the hotel is great - at least the lobby and the pool. But everything else is big, impersonal and not particularly appealing. The corridors of the different wings are clean, generic and boring. Since you wander around quite a bit I would have appreciated some sort of local flair.
sample_comments.positives:
- Pool
- Sunset at pool
- Lobby area
sample_comments.negatives:
- Road close to the pool
- Shuttle bus is not free
- Check in done by trainee staff (not professional)
- Got a room allocated with view on parking lot.

sample_comments.title: Sofitel Krabi
sample_comments.text: We stayed in this hotel for six nights over Christmas. We choose the Sofitel having stayed previously in the Sofitel in Hua Hin. We were initially disappointed when we got to the room. We were in a Luxury Ocean Room which I would not describe as luxury. In my opinion it was no more than a standard room. However, the rest of the hotel was great. Fantastic staff, so friendly and helpful. Top recommendations would be the free speedboat trip to Hong Island and the cookery class. Overall we were happy with our stay but are unlikely to go back mainly because it was too large a hotel and the quality was not what we are used to.
sample_comments.positives: Great location on a lovely beach. The shuttle speedboat to Hong Island is a great trip but you need to book up as it is busy.
sample_comments.negatives: Disappointing rooms. We stayed in a Luxury Ocean Room and it was not better than a standard quality room. It was certainly not luxury. The Spa was expensive.

sample_comments.title: Break from the City
sample_comments.text:
Location of the hotel is far from the city crowd however for give us a break from the crowd is a good choice to stay. Overall the hotel facility is good big swimming pool, activity area, etc.

Hotel provides free boat service to Hong Island and you have to book it in advance. Kayak King and Windsurfing is provided free of charge by the hotel as well.

White Lotus restaurant in the hotel was a good choice of Thai food we were satisfied with its quality of foods and this is one of the best Thai food we had in Thailand.
sample_comments.positives: Design, Restaurant, Activity area are good
sample_comments.negatives: Slow service response

sample_comments.title: The 5-star resort is spacious but a bit old-fashioned. The pool condition is good, but the customer base is family-oriented. The staff attitude is good, but attention to detail seems necessary.
sample_comments.text: I stayed here because it was said to be the most famous in Krabi. The staff were friendly, and I was satisfied with the spacious swimming pool. However, since it is primarily targeted at families, I would not recommend it for couples. The pool water was also warm, making it nice to swim. There was a lifeguard, and the water was clean. (You have to pay for paddle bottles!) Overall, the resort was great, but there was one disappointing aspect. I think I booked without breakfast included. However, I thought breakfast was included, so when I mentioned my room number in front of the restaurant, they let me in. Later, they asked if I needed coffee and double-checked my room number. At that point, if they had confirmed that I was not included, they could have just told me... Instead, I ended up with a receipt for 4,000 baht for 4 people at 1,000 baht each... This isn't the hotel's fault, but typically they would inform you upon checking at the entrance, so it was a bit disappointing to receive the receipt without any explanation... It is my fault for not confirming, but I've been to so many 5-star hotels and resorts, and this has never happened before, so it was surprising! Haha. Due to the tour timing, I ended up eating only eggs, salad, and noodles in a hurry, and that 1,000 baht was a bit hard to take. Well, from the hotel's perspective, it might look like I was eating without paying, but if it was not included, it seems like they should inform the customers! Haha. Also, the taxi cost is very expensive compared to Grab~~! If you need to catch your flight, be prepared since Grab is not easy to get!

sample_comments.text:
The hotel is child-friendly, and the club lounge allows children without any issues. There are also playgrounds and kids' programs available. If I may add, it would be even better if there were more marine activities offered.

The location has a quiet beach in front of the hotel, but the characteristic cliffs of Krabi cannot be seen from the hotel.

sample_comments.title: Not worth it
sample_comments.text: I booked as a solo traveler. The location is very remote, and you will have to pay for a shuttle if you'd like to go off the resort. There weren't many activities to do, and I felt as though the hotel tried to sponge money from their guests as they overcharge for every single thing - activities, transportation, even water and wifi. I've never stayed in a "luxury" hotel that had absolutely NO included amenities. I wouldn't choose to stay here again even if it was a romantic couples' vacation. The staff was pleasant but I could tell they made up their own prices in shuttle transportation as each time id ask for a price it would not coincidence with what the previous staff told me. Then when they nervously changed or dropped the price when I would question them. It just have a lot of mistrust with the hotel staff at this hotel. I even ordered a bottle of Perrier for breakfast and was charged $5 USD (which is twice as much as in the US). If I wanted to pay US prices in Thailand, I would've stayed in the US. I am regretful to have stayed here.
sample_comments.positives: Efficiency of staff, cleanliness, peaceful

sample_comments.title: Staffs need better training for hospitality
sample_comments.text:
The room and building is old . I had better experience to stay in the other small hotel in previous night in terms of staff friendliness , greetings , and attentiveness to hotel guests request . 
The breakfast selection is huge and the standard of the foods are better than the a-la-carte lunch that we have in the hotel restaurant . 
There are few thai restaurants 5 minutes walk from the hotel that serve better foods than the hotel restaurants.
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast , Pool , common facilities

sample_comments.title: It was ok hotel
sample_comments.text:
It was a pleasant one. Only complain was the lack of restaurants in the hotel at night. But once you get to Ao Nang Beach. There are lots of Restuarant s and shopping to do. A very quiet hotel if you want to get away. But if you want a little activities and shopping. I believe Hotels at Ao Nang beaches can offer more.
We were also surprised and woken up at about 4 am by the prayers from the mosque next door. On our first night there. But after a room change, it was quite and peaceful .
Not very child friendly as the pool was quite deep in most parts. must keep an eye on my kids as they were not strong swimmers.
sample_comments.positives: Quiet surrounding, " Nice Beach- not", limited food choices .

sample_comments.title: Friendly staff
sample_comments.text: The stay is good but not the beach, in the hotel description, it says private beach but the beach is not just next to hotel, you need to cross a busy road with a lot of trucks passing by. Also, the beach there is not clean.
sample_comments.positives: Staff is very friendly and attend to your request.

sample_comments.title: Large swimming pool, quiet area
sample_comments.positives: Quiet area, nice big swimming pool

sample_comments.title: Relaxing hotel out of the way
sample_comments.text: Very relaxed stay with great service and great food . Would go back time and time again
sample_comments.positives: Restaurant , pool , and rooms

sample_comments.title: Good relaxing stay
sample_comments.positives: nice serene setting,

sample_comments.title: Good comfortable stay
sample_comments.text: had a comfortable 4 night stay at the sofitel. staff and amenities were all very good. only 2 real restuarants to choose from so that was a bit limiting but the food quality was excellent. it was low season so we felt like we had the whole hotel to ourselves but staff were on hand and all features were up and running. the property is not directly on the beach and you have to cross a road to get to the beach - that was ok but there were no sunbeds and umbrellas on the beach and that made it less appealing. nevertheless there was also no one else on the beach and you had a nice white sand pristine beach to ourselves. 2 great features of the hotel were the free mini bus service into town and a hotel boat which was complimentary to one of the nearby islands. the tour desk was also very helpful. overall we had a good stay and came away very refreshed
sample_comments.positives: great court yard to hotel

sample_comments.title: big luxurious room
sample_comments.text: if u r energetic and not planning to stay in a resort thru out your holiday , than u are better off with other hotels in Aonang because sofitel is quite faraway from the more happening streets of AoNang or krabi town. But if your plan is to do suntanning and rest and relax in a resort,than look no further because Sofitel provide the tranquility you ever need to rest your mind and soul. For the case of my wife and me, we are energetic people and like to see more of krabi, so we rented a car for 1300baht (per day) and ROAM to every corner of Krabi and go back Sofitel only for sleeping ( it was little bit too expensive only for sleeping ..haha)
sample_comments.positives: everyone serves with a smile
sample_comments.negatives: nothing much u can do around the resort

sample_comments.title: Sofitel Phokeethra Krabi Resort & Spa
sample_comments.text:
The hotel's location is suited for guests planning to stay in, relax and enjoy the hotel's in-house facilities. In-house programs for trips to nearby islands, including arrangements for F&B are well-planned, albeit at a price. Distances from the hotel to Krabi town, and the main tourist location of Ao Nang is however rather far, with transportation costs to/from the hotel rather high.

Commendation to the hotel staff, throughout from reception, concierge, activities (child care and other actitivities) to housekeeping, up to the General Manager. The level of service was high, and guests are made to feel more than welcome, with their wishes attended to efficiently and courteously.
sample_comments.positives: High level of hospitality service of staff
sample_comments.negatives: Pricing of F&B, transportation

sample_comments.title: Sofitel - Krabi
sample_comments.text:
Great hotel, grounds and pool. Staff very attentive but struggle with the language barrier.

Great stay overall.
sample_comments.positives: Lobby, Swimming Pool, Grounds
sample_comments.negatives: Language barrier for staff

sample_comments.title: Great pool
sample_comments.text: Super big and nice pool. Rooms are big and comfy. Nice staff and plenty of things to do. Only negative thing is that you have to cross the road to get to the beach.

sample_comments.title: Not worth it....

The hotel is beautiful but a bit on the oldish side (10 years old without renovation). Location is simply bad (a big problem) and hotel shuttles are a rip off. Breakfast was ok... Spa was fully booked the whole Saturday and finding a bed at the pool for three was mission impossible.

Many better options are available in Krabi.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful but for families
sample_comments.text: There is no denying this property has a beautiful pool however as a couple with no children this property felt like a family daycare. The adults only section of the pool wasn't enforced, the pool bar constantly had kids sitting and yelling to each other and even the cocktail bar had kids sitting at the bar. The executive lounge is also very small and hidden away from the view so sunsets and missed. The the price it just wasn't up to standard for me

sample_comments.title: A Satisfactory stay
sample_comments.text: Even though the Hotel had a handful of guests during our stay (evident from the crowd at the breakfast and in the pool and the large number of unlit rooms) we were given 2 rooms at one corner of the resort with no front view at all. The rather spacious balcony was a waste as we overlooked the boundary wall and the adjacent backyard of another dwelling. On requesting for a front (seafacing, pool or garden view) we were told rather politely they were reserved ! The food at the Cafe was very mediocre and not becoming of a top of the line Hotel. The only other dining option during the day was the poolside restaurant which served Western snacks and very few local dishes that too at lunch and dinner hours only. Room service was available though 24 hours.After our first lunch meal at the cafe, we did not eat in the Hotel for this reason other than the breakfast which was quite decent in choices.The boat trips in the Hotel speedboat were simply too exhorbitant charging for 1 person the amount in which a family of 4 could easily do a similar trip in a speedboat through local operators. The beach is across the road though but no facility of any Kayaking, beach chairs, etc provided or set up by the Hotel. Other than the swimming pool and the cleanliness, i would not go back for anything.
sample_comments.positives: The swimming pool, Very polite and friendly staff, Spacious and well kept Rooms.

sample_comments.title: First time in Krabiii
sample_comments.positives: very clean and pretty hotel,

sample_comments.title: very relaxing with great pool
sample_comments.text: we had a very relaxing time in the hotel, unfortunately the restaurants are not up to standard. we were lucky to have a rental car because the location of the hotel does not offer much alternatives and prices for taxi are hilarious. Located right at the sea the hotel does not have a beach but the huge pool is making up for that. The TV sets in the rooms are antiqued.
sample_comments.positives: friendly and attentive staff, nice buffet breakfast, great pool, spacious rooms.

sample_comments.title: Good luxurious comforatable stay
sample_comments.positives: Big area, large pool, on the beach

sample_comments.title: too far from airport travel car way too expensive
sample_comments.text:
hotel awesome but way too far for me taxi car way too expensive not close to anything everything was way too expensive 
staff awesome ..i will never go krabi again ..
sample_comments.positives: far quiet expensive

sample_comments.title: A good hotel with an amazing swimming pool
sample_comments.text: It would have been a great stay if it hadn't been for the rowdy wedding, with guests that ended up knocking on doors and making a tremendous noise from 1am - 4am. Not what I had been looking for with two 4 year olds. Apart from that the hotel was very spacious, clean with attentive staff. The swimming pool was one of the best I have even seen and kept the kids entertained for ages.
sample_comments.positives: The pool, the kids club and the breakfasts

sample_comments.title: Great honeymoon
sample_comments.text: Sofitel is really a place to go n stay in Krabi. It has given me n my wife memories to last a lifetime. Staff is so efficient n friendly as well. Great experience overall. Will go there many more times just to stay at the hotel.
sample_comments.positives: Great staff, gd food n great experience.

sample_comments.title: Secluded beach getaway with plenty of activities
sample_comments.text:
First off the bad stuff : no free wifi in rooms, only available at lobby area (which can get quite crowded in evenings as holiday-makers make plans for coming days) and warm + humid (early Aug). The fans in lobby area don't exactly blow at where people sit and lounge.

Now the good stuff:

1. Big awesome pool with bar where you literally sit in the pool and sip your drinks.
2. Secluded beach and quiet surroundings : Kluong Muong is far away from Ao Nang and the noisiness (could be a bad thing also as it will take about 299 THB / pax one-way hotel shuttle to get to Ao Nang, or 550 THB / one way taxi, 15-minutes).
3. Sofitel's famous So Spa : Very good spa (although I tried only their After-Sun treatment), big comfy rooms, excellent service, and of course L'Occitane spa materials
4. Attentive staff : Complained once to a manager-looking guy about our long wait for veal steak at the in-house Italian restaurant, got free cocktails from the bar after that :)
5. Activities : Sofitel Krabi organizes plenty of exclusive hotel-only excursions to nearby islands. Prices are very reasonable and being limited to hotel guests means you don't have to crowd it out with other backpackers, or travel to Ao Nang to get your island fix.

Overall good place for people seeking a holiday "retreat".
sample_comments.positives: Attentive staff, big awesome pool, excellent So Spa

sample_comments.title: Very good hotel but service is below 5 star
sample_comments.text: It was good except for service at the restaurants which was extremely poor, try to go elsewhere for food if you can.
sample_comments.positives: Long pool with lots of sun lounges, nice garden, low rise buildings

sample_comments.title: superb very refreshing
sample_comments.positives: spacious clean quiet

sample_comments.title: Great trip to Krabi with a family.
sample_comments.text:
Great stay at the Sofitel but i should suggest they improve the quality of their Italian dining restaurant and pool restaurant.
Otherwise everything else was great & we would return.
sample_comments.positives: Language skills of the staff, friendly & attentive staff happy to please the guests

sample_comments.title: relaxing stay but poor room condition
sample_comments.positives: Big pool, nice garden

sample_comments.title: Large well appointed hotel with huge swimming pool
sample_comments.text:
Got off to a rocky start with confsion over our rooms then a poor lunch service: but once brought to managements attention they stepped up and delivred great service from then on.
In off season the 3 restraunts drop to one delivering all the cuisnes in one restraunt. A tad pricey for Thailnad and jsut OK food; Thai is best and Indian and Italian well usual Thailand approximation.Pleanty of scope in a large well appoonted hotel so good for famalies.
sample_comments.positives: Best pool in Asia

sample_comments.text: clean but difficult to use bath room that water from shower came out of the room and yellow tapping water out first time use. if you don't like insects ,you have to prevent your skin.
sample_comments.positives: good service

sample_comments.title: Big international, but with the lack of Charme...
sample_comments.text: The service did not live up to the prices. Food and drinks (and spa) was overpriced. We sometimes had to wait 30min. For a beer. The Communication was sometimes hard.
sample_comments.positives: Big pool!

sample_comments.title: Sofitel
sample_comments.text: Very friendly staff, good food and nice pool. There is a shuttle to ao nang at peak hours but need to pay per pax. There are two resturants, both serving pretty good food. However, the beach is across the road and not direct access. This is the perfect place to see the sunset daily.
sample_comments.positives: Very nice pool, huge and spread across the whole hotel
sample_comments.negatives: The beach is not direct access, need to cross over a road

sample_comments.title: Nice Room, Good Pool
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is good, presents well,food is good, breakfast nice, free boat to Hong Island.

the wine list is a little expensive along with some of the day tours, the bus driver, drives like a maniac, so hang on and just dont look.
sample_comments.positives: Clean and tidy, pool is big and nice with bar in pool
sample_comments.negatives: Beach not great

sample_comments.title: Good but not GREAT
sample_comments.text:
If you've been to some high end Sofitel resorts like in Bali, then this one will let you down. While rooms are spacious, they have that old feel. This includes the bathrooms too.

As for the property, it's 15-20 mins from AaoNang beach, where the main action happens. Also it's 45-50 mins from the airport.

The facilities are limited with not a really beach as part of the resort, but one where you cross the Main Street and go there. So in short, you only have a big pool that's divided between kids and adults areas.

They have activities like yoga, Muay Thai, paddle tennis and more. Also a Pais excursion for sunrise and sunset tour. A few kids activities were there too.
2 restaurants and one All day dining along with one lounge and a gelato parlour is what's onsite. Breaksfast has a decent spread, though I've seen Better at other Sofitels. The white Lotus is a nice restaurant with really tasty meal.

The gym is a sorry excuse and is very basic. Not what I expected from a Sofitel. 

Overall, for a *** A$ a night, it was not worth it. 

But I'll deft recommend to anyone who wants to be away from the hustle and bustle of the touristy area and just wants to relax in a resort by the pool.

sample_comments.title: Dated but spacious rooms
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is located on a remote part of Krabi with not many amenities nearby. Overall the hotel looks decent on the outside but the rooms can do with a refresh. It feels like the hotel has seen better days. We found the yellow tiled floors in the toilet to be rather slippery! There are some bugs and mozzies in the room. 

Breakfast spread is decent. Kids were well entertained with the WIBIT in the pool, as well as the badminton, mini soccer and pickleball on the lawn. 

The staff are polite and courteous.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour Roanna,
Sawasdee Kha! Thank you very much for staying with us during your recent trip to Krabi and for taking time to share your review. 
We are glad to know that you appreciated our breakfast, kids 'facilities, and staff. Nevertheless, your feedback about the room experience is noted. Please accept our apologies for any inconvenience caused and rest assured that I will address this with our management team in order to achieve further improvements. 

In the meantime, in relation to our location, we are purposely located away from the busy tourist towns as we are a holiday resort. We do however provide a shuttle bus twice daily to Ao Nang for our guests to explore the tourist precinct and to see the other side of Krabi. Maybe this option was not explained by our team - we are very sorry if this is the case.
